headline: A Look At Take Two Interactive Software (TTWO) Valuation As Views Diverge On Grand Theft Auto VI Upside
summary: Recent performance snapshot Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) has seen mixed share price moves recently, with a 0.4% decline over the past day and a 3.2% decline over the past week, but a gain over the past month. Over the past 3 months the stock shows a 15.1% decline, while the 1 year total return is slightly positive. In the longer term, the 3 year total return stands well above the 1 year figure.
